purpose: SolarPro Global — beta-testing invitee list (Kenya solar suppliers & installers)
schema_notes: Same shape as ghana_beta_invitees.json. Each entry has a verified email collected from the company's own website or EEE Kenya / ENF directory listing on 2026-06-10. Only entries with confirmed public email addresses are included.
